item.title: New Tax Rules Are in Effect This Season—and Many Filers Don’t Know About Them
item.description: New deductions and rule changes could mean a larger refund for millions of taxpayers this year.

item.title: A New GLP-1 Drug Being Developed May Come With a Surprising New Safety Concern
item.description: Drug maker Eli Lilly is developing a new, more powerful weight-loss drug. Does it work too well?

item.title: Warren Buffett’s Final Berkshire Bet Revealed in New Filing—It’s a Business He Once Called ‘Toast’
item.description: After years of exiting newspapers, Berkshire Hathaway quietly returned to one.

item.title: Everyone Hates Meetings, So Why Do They Keep Multiplying? RTO Is One Culprit
item.description: Studies show some employees are spending more than 10 hours per week in meetings.

item.title: OpenAI’s Latest Moves Speak Volumes About the Future of AI Agents
item.description: OpenAI recently made a key hire—and is bringing a startup called Nerve on board, too. Here’s why.
